#108 Body font-size baseline

Expected: this body text should look like the user-selected reader size, not like tiny 80% text.

The stylesheet sets body font-size to 80%. That value should establish the publisher CSS baseline only. It should not shrink every normal paragraph.

Change the user font size in settings. Expected: this chapter scales with the user font size.

This paragraph is plain body text. It should match the surrounding plain body paragraphs.

This paragraph is plain body text. It should match the surrounding plain body paragraphs.
